custom_section_descriptor_t(3) Library Functions Manual custom_section_descriptor_t(3)

NAME

custom_section_descriptor_t - Custom help section descriptor.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


const char * heading
Section heading (e.g., INTERACTIVECONTROLS"). const char * content
Section content. option_mode_bitmask_t mode_bitmask
Which modes show this section.

Detailed Description

Custom help section descriptor.

Describes a custom section to be printed in help output. Sections appear after EXAMPLES but before OPTIONS.

Definition at line 389 of file builder.h.

Field Documentation

const char* custom_section_descriptor_t::content

Section content.

Definition at line 391 of file builder.h.

Referenced by options_print_help_for_mode().

const char* custom_section_descriptor_t::heading

Section heading (e.g., "INTERACTIVE CONTROLS").

Referenced by options_print_help_for_mode().

option_mode_bitmask_t custom_section_descriptor_t::mode_bitmask
